691.candidate_text:
(
    pos: { x: number; y: number },
    XorO: 'X' | 'O',
    checked: Array<{ x: number; y: number }>
  )

747.candidate_text:
,
    checked: Array<{ x: number; y: number }>

1032.candidate_text:
(
      ({ x, y }) =>
        this.matches({ x, y }, XorO) &&
        checked.filter((spot) => spot.x === x && spot.y === y).length === 0
    )

1768.candidate_text:
? this.board.map((_, i) => ({ x: i, y: i }))
      : this.board[0].map((_, i) => ({ x: 0, y: i }))
